abstract: Welcome Remarks and Introduction to Gemma 4 - Omar Sanseviero and Olivier Lacombe, Google DeepMind Lightning Talks \- Open source contributors\, builders\, and Gemma researchers will do short presentations\. You’ll hear from the creators of tools such as MLX\, Unsloth\, and Cactus Compute Sunset Social - Connect with the open models ecosystem, try out exciting demos, and enjoy an evening of AI!

speakers.name: Olivier Lacombe
speakers.title: Google DeepMind Lightning Talks \- Open source contributors\, builders\, and Gemma researchers will do short presentations\. You’ll hear from the creators of tools such as MLX\, Unsloth\, and Cactus Compute Sunset Social - Connect

title: Brief Agenda
